codeReview.summary: Reviewed the worker transcript, handoff, and commit bbdf0d2. The implementation covers the feature contract: timeout and manual reveal converge on the same finished solo surface, found words are sorted longest-to-shortest, player entries expose valid/invalid state with score feedback and uniqueness toggles, desktop hover inspection highlights board paths, and restart reinitializes round-local solo state.

summary: Pass. The solo results slice is implemented consistently with the feature description and expected behavior, and I did not find actionable blocking or non-blocking code issues in this diff.
